entities.name: Jaya
entities.context: Collaborator working with V on candidate evaluation for a role; accepts the two-story submission requirement and will use the Careerspan platform for public candidates.

entities.name: V
entities.context: Vrijen, founder of Careerspan, working with Jaya to refine the role breakdown and scoring rubric.

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company/platform that serves as the main application channel for public candidates, with an employer portal.

entities.name: employer portal
entities.context: Careerspan interface Jaya will log into to review role breakdown and skills/weights.

entities.name: two-story submission requirement
entities.context: Default requirement that candidates submit at least two stories so scoring is meaningful; accepted by Jaya as part of the candidate experience.

entities.name: role breakdown
entities.context: Structured definition of the role including skills and weights; Jaya will review and confirm, V will refine.

entities.name: scoring rubric
entities.context: Evaluation framework for candidates; V will refine based on Jaya's qualitative input.

entities.name: ideal human profile
entities.context: Qualitative attributes for the role; Jaya will send a voice memo describing these to V.

entities.name: public vs. curated candidate flow
entities.context: Workflow agreement: public applicants flow through Careerspan, rockstar candidates handled case-by-case.

relationships.context: Collaborating on candidate evaluation process for a specific role.
Will use Careerspan as the main application channel for public candidates.
Will log in to review role breakdown and confirm skills/weights.
Accepts this as a core part of the candidate experience for this role.
V will refine both based on Jaya's qualitative input.
Jaya's qualitative attributes will inform refinements to the structured role breakdown.
